recommendations.title: Kristy
recommendations.overview: When a college girl who is alone on campus over the Thanksgiving break is targeted by a group of outcasts, she must conquer her deepest fears to outwit them and fight back.

recommendations.title: Tucker and Dale vs. Evil
recommendations.overview: Two hillbillies are suspected of being killers by a group of paranoid college kids camping near the duo's West Virginian cabin. As the body count climbs, so does the fear and confusion as the college kids try to seek revenge against the pair.

recommendations.title: A Charlie Brown Thanksgiving
recommendations.overview: Turkey, cranberries, pumpkin pie... and the Peanuts gang to share them with. This is going to be the greatest Thanksgiving ever! The fun begins when Peppermint Patty invites herself and her pals to Charlie Brown's house for a REALLY big turkey party.

recommendations.title: Prevenge
recommendations.overview: A pregnant widow, believing herself to be guided by her unborn child, embarks on a homicidal rampage.

recommendations.title: 2001 Maniacs
recommendations.overview: On their way to Spring Break, college kids take a detour through an old Southern town. The people of Pleasant Valley insist the kids stay for their annual barbecue celebration... but instead of getting a taste of the old South, the old South gets a t

recommendations.title: My Mom Is a Character
recommendations.overview: After another spat with her kids, Dona Hermínia decides to take some time off from them and hides away in her aunt's house, where she reminisces about her kids in an age when they still needed her.

recommendations.title: Seed of Chucky
recommendations.overview: This time around, Chucky and his homicidal honey, Tiffany, are brought back to life by their orphan offspring, Glen. Then the horror goes Hollywood as Chucky unleashes his own brand of murderous mayhem!

recommendations.title: Not Cool
recommendations.overview: Former prom king Scott returns home for Thanksgiving break and gets dumped by his long-term girlfriend. With his world turned upside down, Scott strikes an unlikely friendship with former classmate Tori, an ugly duckling who blossomed in her first se

recommendations.title: The Vicious Kind
recommendations.overview: A man tries to warn his brother away from the new girlfriend he brings home during Thanksgiving, but ends up becoming infatuated with her in the process.

recommendations.title: Wind Chill
recommendations.overview: Two college students share a ride home for the holidays. When they break down on a deserted stretch of road, they're preyed upon by the ghosts of people who have died there.
